recommendations.title: Emma
recommendations.overview: Teo has a good job, a fiancee, a lover, no intention to assume any responsibility in his life. Meeting Emma, a blind woman, will upset his convictions.

recommendations.title: Come Undone
recommendations.overview: Anna is an accountant for an important insurance firm and lives with her longterm lover Alessio - a man who longs for a stable longterm relationship with children, home, etc. Anna, feeling as though the fire has fizzled in that relationship takes up

recommendations.title: The Tasters
recommendations.overview: In autumn 1943, in Gross-Partsch, 26-year-old Rosa, who had come from Berlin to stay with the parents of her husband Gregor, who was fighting on the Russian front, was taken by the SS to a mysterious place. Forced to taste a dish, she joins the group

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar
recommendations.overview: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up — but life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

recommendations.title: The Tourist
recommendations.overview: American tourist Frank meets mysterious British woman Elise on the train to Venice. Romance seems to bud, but there's more to her than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: EverAfter
recommendations.overview: Danielle, a vibrant young woman, was forced into servitude after the death of her father when she was a young girl. Danielle's stepmother, Rodmilla, is a heartless woman who forces Danielle to do the cooking and cleaning, while she tries to marry off

recommendations.title: 1000 Miles From Christmas
recommendations.overview: An auditor who completely despises Christmas is sent to a small town for work, where he meets a woman determined to change his view about the holiday.

recommendations.title: Design for Living
recommendations.overview: An independent woman can't choose between the two men she loves.
